---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve IRIS
title: "[BUG] <Short, descriptive title>"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🚶 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Upload resume '...'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots & Logs
If applicable, add screenshots, video clips, or terminal/console logs to help explain your problem.
* **Console logs**: Paste any error logs from your browser console or your Python server output here.
* **Screenshots**: Drag and drop images here.

## 💻 Environment Setup
* **Operating System**: (e.g., Windows 11, macOS Sequoia, Ubuntu 24.04)
* **Browser**: (e.g., Chrome 124, Firefox 125, Safari 17)
* **Node.js Version**: (e.g., v20.11.0)
* **Python Version**: (e.g., v3.11.4)
* **AI Provider & Model used**: (e.g., Groq Llama-3, Gemini 1.5, Azure OpenAI)

## 💡 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., specific PDF templates that trigger this bug).
